name: Ophiopogon
summary: It is best framed as a moistening tonic-style root with traditional-system relevance.
description: It is best framed as a moistening tonic-style root with traditional-system relevance.
contraindications: statin or immunosuppressant or benzodiazepine medication because ophiopogon has been shown to alter CYP3A4 enzyme activity and change how these drugs are cleared including increased midazolam exposure in research
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to insufficient safety data
known allergy to the plant family
weak spleen and stomach or excessive cold and dampness conditions in traditional Chinese medicine use because ophiopogon's cooling property may aggravate these patterns

sources.title: The structures and biological functions of polysaccharides from traditional Chinese herbs
Ophiopogonin D: review of pharmacological activity
Methylophiopogonanone a attenuates pulmonary fibrosis by inhibiting SPP1-mediated macrophage polarization via the PI3K/Akt pathway

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Root/rhizome preparations are commonly used as teas and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
